meetings_db.title: Product development progress review
meetings_db.summary:
Meeting Notes Summary

Meeting Title: Product Development Sync
Date: 25 March 2026
Time: 10:00 AM – 11:15 AM
Location: Zoom / Conference Room B

Attendees
John Tan (Project Manager)
Sarah Lim (Product Lead)
Daniel Wong (Engineering Lead)
Priya Nair (UX Designer)
Marcus Lee (QA Lead)
Agenda
Sprint progress review
Feature updates
Bug tracking and QA status
Timeline and deliverables
Any other business
Key Discussion Points

1. Sprint Progress

Engineering team reported ~75% completion of current sprint tasks.
Slight delay due to integration issues with payment API.
Backend services are stable; frontend still undergoing UI refinements.

2. Feature Updates

New user onboarding flow has been implemented and is ready for internal testing.
Dashboard analytics feature is still in development, expected completion by next sprint.
Decision made to postpone social sharing feature to next release phase.

3. Bug Tracking & QA

QA team identified 12 new bugs, 5 marked as high priority.
Critical issue with login timeout under investigation.
Regression testing scheduled for Thursday.

4. Timeline & Deliverables

Current release deadline remains 5 April 2026, but flagged as “at risk.”
Buffer time may be required depending on API issue resolution.
Team agreed to reassess timeline in next meeting.

5. Other Business

Priya suggested improving accessibility compliance (WCAG standards).
Discussion on adding user feedback collection post-launch.

meetings_db.title: HR policy and recruitment update discussion
meetings_db.summary:
Meeting Notes Summary

Meeting Title: HR Policy & Recruitment Update
Date: 25 March 2026
Time: 2:00 PM – 3:15 PM
Location: Conference Room A

Attendees
Amanda Chen (HR Manager)
Kevin Tan (Recruitment Lead)
Lisa Wong (Employee Engagement Specialist)
Ravi Kumar (HR Analyst)
Emily Lim (Training Coordinator)
Agenda
Recruitment pipeline updates
Employee onboarding & training programs
HR policy review
Employee engagement initiatives
Any other business
Key Discussion Points

1. Recruitment Pipeline

Current open positions: 8 roles across Engineering, Sales, and Marketing.
3 candidates shortlisted for Engineering roles; interviews scheduled next week.
Recruitment team exploring new job boards to attract diverse candidates.

2. Onboarding & Training

New onboarding schedule finalized for April hires.
Training program for soft skills and compliance to be rolled out next month.
Feedback from previous onboarding sessions showed high satisfaction, but suggested more role-specific mentorship.

3. HR Policy Review

Annual leave policy updates discussed; approved changes to be communicated by email.
Remote work policy revisions finalized for hybrid team arrangements.

4. Employee Engagement

Planning a quarterly virtual team-building event in early May.
Employee survey results indicate interest in wellness programs and flexible hours.

5. Other Business

Discussion on implementing an internal referral bonus scheme.
Kevin suggested a hiring tracker dashboard for management review.

triples.subject: Training program
triples.object: To be rolled out next month
